title: SecretValue: no Debug/Clone/Display is a correct permanent design choice
description: SecretValue deliberately omits Debug, Clone, Display, Serialize, Deserialize. This forces all copies to be explicit (via as_bytes().to_vec()) and prevents accidental leakage via log macros or JSON serializers. A contributor who wants Debug for test ergonomics will suggest adding #[derive(Debug)]. Reject: tests should use assert_eq!(v.as_bytes(), b'expected'), not print the value. The missing impls are intentional safety constraints, not omissions.
